steps.title: Isolate the requested expression
steps.content: The question asks for $2(x-7)$, so isolate that expression directly instead of solving for $x$.

steps.title: Subtract eighteen
steps.content:
Start with
$$54=18+2(x-7)$$
Subtract $18$ from both sides.
$$54-18=2(x-7)$$
So
$$36=2(x-7)$$
The answer is C.
